creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233097
Upgrade to 5.4.2

When upgrading ftp/ocaml-ocurl a problem of dependencies in ocaml-lwt has been revealed:

- libev is required;

- there is no more module seq
	see a discussion about that at https://github.com/ocsigen/lwt/issues/794

This updated patch fixed the problem.
